name: NF - Funny AF with Kevin Hart (2026) (US)
plot: Kevin Hart travels the country with the help of comedy legends to find the next stand-up superstar — with the winner crowned live by your real-time vote.

name: NF - Sebastian Maniscalco: Why Would You Do That? (2016)
plot: Comedian Sebastian Maniscalco performs his third Showtime special at the Beacon Theatre in Manhattan.

name: NF - Sebastian Maniscalco: What's Wrong with People? (2012)
plot: "What's Wrong with People?" asks Sebastian Maniscalco, as he hilariously tries to bridge the Italian-American Old World he grew up in with the contemporary frenetic world we all live in today.

name: NF - Patton Oswalt: I Love Everything (2020)
plot: Turning 50. Finding love again. Buying a house. Experiencing existential dread at Denny's. Life comes at Patton Oswalt fast in this stand-up special.

name: NF - Zona Rosa (2019) (MX)
plot: An assortment of talent takes the stage for a night of honest stand-up featuring four of Mexico's funniest LGBTQ comedians.

name: NF - Tiffany Haddish Presents: They Ready (2019) (US)
plot: Tiffany Haddish introduces her favorite comedians in a series of stand-up performances.

name: NF - The Standups (2017) (US)
plot: Comedy's freshest voices take the stage in LA for six half-hour specials packed with sly jokes, hilarious anecdotes and awkward confessions.

name: NF - The Honeymoon Stand Up Special (2018) (US)
plot: Impending parenthood does funny things to Natasha Leggero and Moshe Kasher, who dissect family, relationships and more in a trio of stand-up specials.

name: NF - The Comedy Lineup (2018) (US)
plot: A diverse group of up-and-coming comedians perform 15-minute sets in this stand-up comedy showcase series.

name: NF - That’s My Time with David Letterman (2022) (US)
plot: David Letterman invites some of the hottest up-and-coming stand-up stars to perform a set and sit down for a chat.

name: NF - Standup and Away! with Brian Regan (2018) (US)
plot: Comic Brian Regan has become a well-known name on the comedy circuit since releasing his first stand-up album in 1997. In this hybrid series, he blends his trademark observational stand-up with short sketches and audience interaction. Topics range from everyday things that people can relate to -- such as sitting too close to others at restaurants and lost luggage -- to more out-there subjects like being the guy who flew to the moon but didn't get to walk on it.

name: NF - Romesh Ranganathan: The Cynic (2022) (GB)
plot: Going back to his hometown of Crawley, England, Romesh Ranganathan will talk about vegan-ism, his kids - and offers a peek into the making of his comedy special.

name: NF - Only Jokes Allowed (2022) (ZA)
plot: Six of South Africa's top comedians take center stage and showcase their talent in this collection of short stand-up sets.

name: NF - Mad Crazy Colombian Comedians (2021) (CO)
plot: Four of Colombia's funniest and bawdiest comedians perform before a post-quarantine audience hungry for their stories.
cast: Pamela Ospina, Freddy Beltrán, Diego Camargo

name: NF - Ellen DeGeneres: Relatable (2018)
plot: In her first special since 2003, Ellen revisits her road to stardom and details the heartfelt -- and hilarious -- lessons she's learned along the way.

name: NF - Lugar de Mulher (2019) (BR)
plot: Four comedians from Brazil joke about sexuality, politics, religion and motherhood - and show that the woman's place is wherever she wants to be.
cast: Bruna Louise, Micheli Machado, Cintia Rosini, Carolina Zoccoli

name: NF - Ladies Up (2020) (IN)
plot: Rising India-based comics Prashasti Singh, Kaneez Surka, Supriya Joshi, and Niveditha Prakasam bring no-holds-barred humor to this stand up series
cast: Supriya Joshi, Niveditha Prakasam, Prashasti Singh, Kaneez Surka

name: NF - James Acaster: Repertoire (2018) (GB)
plot: Offbeat comic James Acaster covers the strange, the mundane and everything in between in this collection of four wide-ranging stand-up specials.

name: NF - Historical Roasts (2019) (US)
plot: "Roastmaster General" Jeff Ross and a slew of guest stars poke fun at major historical figures while also honoring their enduring impact on the world.

name: NF - Fary: Hexagone (2020) (FR)
plot: French comedy phenom Fary puts a playful spin on questions of identity, culture and more in the first half of an epic two-part stand-up special.

name: NF - Dave Chappelle (2017) (US)
plot: Comedy icon Dave Chappelle makes his triumphant return to the screen with a pair of blistering, fresh stand-up specials.

name: NF - Daniel Sloss: Live Shows (2018) (GB)
plot: Comedian Daniel Sloss is ready to find the funny in some very dark topics, from the deeply personal to the truly irreverent.

name: NF - COMEDIANS of the world (2019)
plot: Global stand-up comedy series features a diverse set of comics from 13 regions bringing their perspectives on what's funny around the world.

name: NF - Bumping Mics with Jeff Ross & Dave Attell (2018) (US)
plot: When Jeff Ross and Dave Attell take the stage, no one is safe. With the help of special guests, they're packing a lot of laughs into one epic weekend.

name: NF - Verified Stand-Up (2023) (US)
plot: Ten comics. Ten dynamic sets. Two episodes. Discover your new favorite stand-up act as top performers take the stage at Webster Hall in New York City.

name: NF - Schulz Saves America (2020) (US)
plot: Comedian Andrew Schulz takes on the year's most divisive topics in this fearlessly unfiltered and irreverent four-part special.

name: NF - The Degenerates (2018) (US)
plot: Six stand-ups explore the coarse and salacious side of comedy in this series of half-hour specials. For mature audiences.
